title: Ameriprise Financial Recognized by Newsweek as One of "America’s Greatest Workplaces for Women" for the Fourth Consecutive Year
summary: Ameriprise Financial has been named one of "America’s Greatest Workplaces for Women 2026" by Newsweek for the fourth consecutive year, based on employee surveys and evaluations of workplace satisfaction factors like work-life balance and compensation. The recognition highlights Ameriprise's commitment to fostering a positive work environment for women, as affirmed by internal leadership and external research from Plant-A Insights Group.

title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Mereo BioPharma Group plc Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Mereo BioPharma Group plc (NASDAQ: MREO) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between June 5, 2023, and December 26, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Mereo made false and misleading statements regarding its Phase 3 ORBIT and COSMIC programs, which failed to meet their primary endpoints. Investors are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of April 6, 2026.

title: CELEBRITY CRUISES IS REDEFINING RIVER TRAVEL WITH THE INDUSTRY'S MOST EXTENSIVE AND EXPERIENTIAL DESTINATION EXPERIENCES – Company Announcement - FT.com
summary: Celebrity River Cruises has launched a new destination discovery program for its 2027 and 2028 itineraries, featuring four unique experience categories: Storyteller Series, Skillmaster Series, Keys to the City Series, and Celebrity Takeover Series. These programs, along with pre- and post-cruise stays, aim to offer deeply immersive and culturally rich experiences in European cities like Prague, Budapest, and Amsterdam. The initiative focuses on connecting travelers with local culture through insider-led tours, hands-on activities, tech-driven exploration, and bespoke events, ensuring memorable and personalized vacations.

title: Coca-Cola Leadership Details Digital Roadmap: Moving from Data Silos to a Connected Network
summary: Coca-Cola is pursuing a multi-year digital roadmap aimed at transforming its enterprise from fragmented data silos to a connected network. The company's leadership, including CFO John Murphy and COO Henrique Braun, emphasized the importance of leveraging connected datasets, achieving "data intimacy" for precise scalability, and focusing on consumer-centricity, balanced growth, and pervasive digital integration. These efforts are guided by newly appointed Chief Digital Officer Sedef Salingan Sahin and involve significant investment in AI, including partnerships with Microsoft and MIT's Generative AI Impact Consortium.

title: BofA’s Hartnett Warns Markets Are Starting to Look Like 2008
summary: Bank of America strategist Michael Hartnett warns that current market conditions, driven by spiking oil prices and private credit concerns, are reminiscent of the period before the 2008 global financial crisis. He draws parallels between the significant rise in oil prices and early credit market instability then and the recent 60% surge in oil due to the Iran war alongside growing private credit pressures now.

title: Quadrature Capital Ltd Boosts HCA Healthcare Stock Position
summary: Quadrature Capital Ltd significantly increased its stake in HCA Healthcare, growing its holdings by 977.2% during the 3rd quarter. The institutional investor now owns 200,999 shares of HCA Healthcare, valued at $85,674,000, suggesting it sees strong growth potential in the major healthcare provider. This makes Quadrature Capital one of HCA Healthcare's largest institutional investors, holding approximately 0.09% of the company's stock.

title: Oil and Gas Equipment Rental Market Growth 2025: Demand Rising
summary: The global Oil and Gas Equipment Rental Market is experiencing significant growth driven by increasing energy demand, expansion of offshore exploration activities, and the need for specialized equipment in unconventional resource development. Companies are opting for rentals to improve operational efficiency and manage capital expenditures, as rental providers offer access to advanced technologies, predictive maintenance, and scalable solutions for complex drilling and production environments. Key players in this market include Schlumberger Limited, Halliburton Company, and Baker Hughes Company, which are actively expanding their rental portfolios through new offerings and strategic acquisitions.

The deal is subject to definitive agreements and closing conditions, marking UTime's strategic entry into the Web3 and blockchain data infrastructure sector.

European investors are advised to view Oportun as a cyclical fintech exposure, with the next 2-3 quarters being critical to assess stabilization in credit trends and potential rerating.

title: SS Innovations International Q4 Loss And High P S Multiple Test Bullish Narratives
summary: SS Innovations International (SSII) reported a Q4 2025 revenue of US$14.5 million and a basic EPS loss of US$0.0127, with a trailing twelve-month net loss of US$12.1 million on US$42.5 million revenue. This combination of ongoing losses and a rich valuation tests bullish narratives and prompts investors to consider funding long-term operations and potential shareholder dilution.

title: Honda Killing Its EVs Might Mean Sony Is Screwed, Too
summary: Honda has announced it is canceling the development and launch of three electric vehicles, which were all to be based on the same next-generation EV platform. This decision puts the future of the Afeela 1, an electric sedan from a joint venture between Honda and Sony that also uses this platform, into jeopardy. Sony Honda Mobility is currently reviewing how Honda's decision affects their joint venture, and the Afeela's current price and range make it uncompetitive in the EV market.

title: ACCESS Newswire to Host Fourth Quarter and Year End Earnings Conference Call on March 19, 2026

title: Xenetic Biosciences, Inc. Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results

Xenetic is focused on advancing its DNase-based technology into Phase 1 clinical development as an adjunctive therapy for pancreatic carcinoma and other solid tumors.

title: Century Casinos Fiscal 2025 Results: Quarterly & Annual Revenue and Loss - News and Statistics
summary: Century Casinos Inc. reported a significant loss in both its fourth quarter and the full fiscal year ending 2025. The company posted a Q4 loss of $17.9 million on $138 million in revenue, resulting in a loss of 61 cents per share. For the entire fiscal year, the casino operator recorded an annual loss of $61.4 million, or $2.04 per share, with total revenue reaching $573 million.

title: Etsy Inc stock (ISIN: US29786A1060) rallies on Depop exit, but valuation risks loom as growth slows
summary: Etsy's stock rallied 14% after selling its Depop subsidiary to eBay for $1.2 billion, a move signaling a strategic refocus on its core handmade marketplace. While analysts view this as a positive strategic reset, valuation risks remain, with Etsy's P/E ratio nearly double its peers and growth decelerating. The company needs to prove sustainable growth acceleration through app penetration and AI-driven personalization to justify its premium valuation.

title: Stifel cuts Health Catalyst stock price target on migration woes
summary: Stifel lowered its price target for Health Catalyst Inc. (NASDAQ:HCAT) due to ongoing "Ignite-migration pressures" and weaker-than-expected Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue and EBITDA guidance. The company faces challenges in migrating clients from legacy DOS to Ignite, with significant revenue at risk. Stifel maintains a Hold rating, awaiting more conclusive data, but suggests the company could be an acquisition target given its undervalued status and recent mixed Q4 2025 financial results.

title: Reed Arian Simone, director at Steven Madden, sells $120k in SHOO
summary: Reed Arian Simone, a director at Steven Madden (NASDAQ:SHOO), sold 3,600 shares of common stock for approximately $120,374 on March 12, 2026. This transaction occurred as the stock trades down 21% year-to-date, despite the company reporting strong fourth-quarter 2025 financial results with an EPS of $0.48 and revenue of $753.7 million. Analysts from Williams Trading and Needham have adjusted their price targets downwards, citing concerns over cost pressures and private label sales, while maintaining a Buy rating.

title: Second Study Affirms Superiority of iMDx GraftAssure Assay’s Proprietary dd-cfDNA Combination Model Score
summary: A new peer-reviewed study validates the superiority of Insight Molecular Diagnostics Inc.'s (iMDx) GraftAssure™ assay, specifically its proprietary Combination Model (CM)-score, for detecting kidney transplant rejection. Published in Transplant International, the study found the CM-score outperformed other dd-cfDNA measures, mirroring inflammatory activity in biopsies, and supports iMDx's goal to commercialize an industry-leading molecular diagnostic test kit for kidney transplant patients. This further reinforces data presented at the World Transplant Congress in 2025, highlighting the technology's clinical differentiation and market potential in the $2 billion-plus transplant rejection testing market.

title: Simply Good Foods Co. Stock Plummets to New 52-Week Low at $14.82
summary: The Simply Good Foods Co. stock has plummeted to a new 52-week low of $14.82, representing a 59.15% decline over the past year and significantly underperforming the S&P 500. The company faces financial challenges including rising raw material costs and low operating cash flow, despite trading at a discount with a price-to-book ratio of 0.99. Its market capitalization is $1,717 million with a P/E ratio of 15.00.

title: A Look At Acadia Healthcare (ACHC) Valuation After Growth Guidance And Board Appointment
summary: Acadia Healthcare (ACHC) recently appointed Daniel Cancelmi to its Board of Directors, bringing investor focus to its revenue trends, bed expansion, and reaffirmed 2026 financial guidance. While one narrative suggests ACHC is significantly overvalued at $11.94 compared to its $24.15 closing price, a discounted cash flow model suggests the stock is undervalued, raising questions about which valuation approach is more accurate.

title: Single apheresis yields 5B NK cells in ImmunityBio cancer program
summary: ImmunityBio announced the successful completion of manufacturing engineering programs NK2022 and NK2023, enabling scalable production of its autologous memory cytokine-enhanced natural killer (M-ceNK) cell therapy. A single apheresis can yield up to 5 billion M-ceNK cells, sufficient for 8-10 patient doses within 12 days, supporting the concept of a "World Bank of NK Cells." Early clinical trials demonstrated the safety and efficacy of M-ceNK cells combined with ANKTIVA® in cancer patients, showing potent cytotoxic activity against various tumor lines.

title: Silgan Holdings, Inc. Experiences Valuation Adjustment Amidst Competitive Packaging Sector Landscape
summary: Silgan Holdings, Inc., a small-cap packaging company, has seen a valuation adjustment with its stock price declining and a negative return over the past year compared to the S&P 500. Despite these challenges, its financial metrics like P/E, price-to-book, EV to EBITDA, PEG ratio, dividend yield, and ROE indicate a competitive position within the packaging sector. The company's current stock price is $44.41, down from its previous close of $45.86.

title: Innovative Industrial Properties Maintains $1.90 Q1 Dividend Amid Steady Cannabis REIT Landscape
summary: Innovative Industrial Properties (IIPR) has declared a Q1 2026 dividend of $1.90 per share, maintaining its payout and signaling portfolio stability in the specialized cannabis industrial REIT sector. The article highlights IIP's robust financial health, long-term outlook driven by the expanding U.S. cannabis market, and accessibility for European investors via Xetra.

title: Ollie’s Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:OLLI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:OLLI) reported a strong Q4 and fiscal year 2025, with EPS in line with expectations at $1.39. For 2026, Ollie's plans to open 75 new stores, targeting mid-teens EPS growth, and aims to return 50% of free cash flow to shareholders through buybacks.

While optimistic analysts project higher earnings, Citigroup's cautious stance suggests a reframing of investment expectations for the company.

title: UroGen Applauds BCAN’s New Faces of Bladder Cancer Report Highlighting Recurrence Burden and Fear of Recurrence
summary: UroGen Pharma Ltd. has praised the Bladder Cancer Advocacy Network's (BCAN) new "The New Faces of Bladder Cancer Report," which reveals the significant burden of recurrence and fear of recurrence among bladder cancer patients. The national survey of over 1,100 patients showed that nearly 80% fear recurrence, with this figure rising to over 90% for those under 50. The report also highlights the high number of medical procedures patients undergo, with many reporting five or more cystoscopies.

summary: Newegg Commerce, Inc. has officially opened its 2,500-square-foot Gamer Zone to the public in Southern California. This immersive space is designed to foster gaming culture, esports, and hands-on technology education for gamers, creators, students, and tech enthusiasts. The Gamer Zone will host esports tournaments, PC building workshops, student visits, vendor showcases, and community gaming nights, serving as a hub for interactive tech discovery.

title: Townsquare Media, Vestis, and Ashland: 3 Under-the-Radar Stocks to Watch
summary: This article highlights three under-the-radar stocks—Townsquare Media (TSQ), Vestis (VSTS), and Ashland (ASH)—that are showing signs of operational improvement after periods of weakness. title: Mission Produce, Inc. (NASDAQ:AVO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Mission Produce, Inc. (NASDAQ:AVO) held its Q1 2026 earnings call, where CEO Steve Barnard announced his transition to Executive Chairman, with John Pawlowski taking over as CEO. title: Newegg Opens Public Gamer Zone, Expanding Gaming, Esports, and Tech Education in Southern California
summary: Newegg Commerce, Inc. has officially opened its immersive Gamer Zone to the public, a 2,300-square-foot space in Diamond Bar, California, dedicated to gaming, esports, and hands-on technology education. The Gamer Zone aims to be a community hub for gamers, creators, students, and tech enthusiasts, offering high-performance PCs, racing simulators, VR/MR stations, and hosting various programming events like esports tournaments, PC building workshops, and vendor showcases. This initiative marks an evolution for Newegg beyond traditional e-commerce, creating a physical environment for community engagement, experiential retail, and education.

title: Ivanhoe Electric to Receive $58.4 million Cash Distribution from Cordoba Minerals Corp
summary: Ivanhoe Electric Inc. is set to receive a $58.4 million cash distribution from its 59.6%-owned subsidiary, Cordoba Minerals Corp., following Cordoba's sale of the Alacrán Project in Colombia. This distribution will significantly enhance Ivanhoe Electric's liquidity, adding to its already strong cash position of $173.3 million as of December 31, 2025, and an additional $82.6 million from warrant exercises. The company continues to focus on mineral exploration in the US and international partnerships to secure critical metals.

title: Cantor Fitzgerald Keeps Overweight on Agios Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (AGIO) Mar 2026
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald maintained its "Overweight" rating on Agios Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (AGIO) on March 12, 2026, driven by confidence in the company’s late-stage program and the commercial potential of Aqvesme in thalassemia. The analyst firm views Aqvesme as a key growth driver, leading to a minor intraday price movement for AGIO, suggesting the market saw the reiteration as confirmation rather than new information. Meyka AI gives AGIO a "B" grade, citing upside from clinical milestones but also flagging execution and commercial risks.

title: Liberty Live (LLYVA) to exchange $1,014 million of 2.375% 2053 debentures

(LLYVA) has entered into agreements to exchange approximately $1,014 million of its old 2.375% Exchangeable Senior Debentures due 2053 for new ones with the same principal and coupon. The exchange is expected to close around March 20, 2026, subject to customary conditions.

title: TD Cowen Reduces Its PT for American Airlines (AAL) to $13, Reiterates “Buy” Rating
summary: TD Cowen has lowered its price target for American Airlines (AAL) from $17 to $13, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This adjustment is due to rising fuel prices caused by geopolitical tensions, which have led the firm to reduce earnings estimates for major airlines. Despite anticipating some recovery through ticket pricing, TD Cowen cautions against significant margin expansion in 2026 unless energy costs decrease swiftly.

title: Jackson Financial Inc Stock (ISIN: US46641X1090) Faces Insider Selling Pressure Amid Undervaluation
summary: Jackson Financial Inc (ISIN: US46641X1090) is facing mixed signals regarding insider transactions, with Director Derek Kirkland selling 10,000 shares while other executives received routine equity grants. The company's business model, focused on annuities and retirement solutions, positions it well within the annuity sector, and institutional buying by firms like Russell Investments Group Ltd. suggests confidence in its long-term potential.

title: Signing Day Sports Stockholders Approve Previously Announced Business Combination with BlockchAIn Digital Infrastructure at Today’s Special Meeting of Stockholders
summary: Signing Day Sports, Inc. stockholders have approved the previously announced business combination with BlockchAIn Digital Infrastructure, Inc. title: Gebbia Media’s Tactical Wealth Launches on Newsmax 2, Highlighting Veteran Entrepreneurs, creating booming American Businesses

This new weekly program, hosted by former U.S. Navy SEAL Kaj Larsen, expands a popular podcast to television, focusing on military and veteran entrepreneurs. The show aims to provide actionable insights and inspiration for veterans by featuring successful individuals like billionaire John Paul DeJoria and General Laura Richardson, exploring their journeys from military service to business success and wealth creation.

title: Volato Group (NYSE: SOAR) warns on going-concern, plans M2i merger and AI growth
summary: Volato Group (NYSE: SOAR) has reported significant financial risks, including recurring net losses and an auditor's going-concern warning for 2025, emphasizing its reliance on new capital. The company is pivoting from aircraft ownership to a software-led model, with its Vaunt empty-leg platform showing growth and its Parslee AI platform entering pilot programs. Volato also plans a merger with M2i Global, which would see M2i stockholders owning about 85% of the combined company, and faces potential dilution from convertible notes.

title: United Bankshares Inc Stock (ISIN: US9026741097) Holds Steady Amid Regional Banking Pressures
summary: United Bankshares Inc. (UBSI) stock is demonstrating resilience in a volatile regional banking sector, drawing investor attention with its focus on loan growth and deposit stability. The company's stable performance, solid quarterly results, and robust capital ratio offer a contrast to more volatile peers, particularly appealing to global investors seeking stable exposure to US community banking. Key factors include effective management of net interest margin, disciplined credit quality, and a commitment to shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchases.

title: Escalade Appoints Patrick J. Griffin as Chief Executive Officer and President
summary: Escalade, Incorporated has officially appointed Patrick J. Griffin as its full-time Chief Executive Officer and President, effective March 5, 2026. Griffin, who previously served as interim CEO since October, has a long history with the company, including roles as director and Vice President of Corporate Development and Investor Relations. The Board expressed confidence in Griffin's leadership to drive growth and build on the company's strong foundation, while Griffin emphasized his commitment to delivering long-term value to customers, team members, and shareholders.

title: Equillium secures $35 million financing from RA Capital Management
summary: Equillium, a biotechnology company, has secured approximately $35 million in financing through a private placement with RA Capital Management. This funding is expected to extend the company's cash runway into 2029 and will support the advancement of its lead therapeutic candidate, EQ504, for treating ulcerative colitis. The investment demonstrates investor confidence in Equillium's strategic direction and its focus on developing novel treatments for autoimmune and inflammatory disorders.

title: Benchmark reiterates Omnicell stock rating on product cycle outlook
summary: Benchmark reiterated a Buy rating and $60.00 price target on Omnicell (NASDAQ:OMCL) shares, following an investor meeting with the company's CFO, despite a recent 15% stock decline. Analyst Bill Sutherland highlighted the multi-year opportunity for accelerating revenue growth and margin expansion driven by new products Titan XT and Omnisphere. The company's CFO, Baird Radford, anticipates non-GAAP EBITDA margin returning to pre-pandemic levels and growing at twice the pace of mid-single-digit revenue guidance for the year, with plans to offer financing for customers to level the playing field with competitors.

title: Central Garden & Pet (A) Stock (ISIN: US15135B2007) Faces Pressure Amid Pet Sector Slowdown
summary: Central Garden & Pet (A) stock fell over 8% after its fiscal Q1 results missed analyst expectations, reporting weaker sales in both pet and garden segments. The company's pet segment experienced slower demand for superpremium food, while garden products were affected by mild weather. Despite maintaining guidance for fiscal 2026, investors are concerned about valuation and macroeconomic headwinds, though the company's strong balance sheet provides some stability.

title: Full Truck Alliance Co. Ltd. (NYSE:YMM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Full Truck Alliance (NYSE:YMM) reported its Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 earnings, missing EPS expectations. Management emphasized their strategy of balancing scale and quality, integrating AI across operations for efficiency, and expanding into new growth drivers like overseas markets and autonomous driving, while committing to substantial shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchases.

title: Experimental colitis pill gets $35M boost, funded into 2029
summary: Equillium (Nasdaq: EQ) announced a $35 million PIPE financing with RA Capital Management, involving the issuance of approximately 18.9 million shares at $1.854 per share. This strategic investment from RA Capital aims to strengthen Equillium's balance sheet and support its clinical objectives.

title: Equillium Announces $35 Million Financing with RA Capital Management
summary: Equillium, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQ) announced a definitive securities purchase agreement with RA Capital Management, securing approximately $35 million in gross proceeds. This financing is expected to extend Equillium's cash runway into 2029 and will be used to advance the clinical development of EQ504, a novel therapy for ulcerative colitis. The investment from RA Capital Management signifies confidence in Equillium's strategy and commitment to its clinical objectives.

summary: HDFC Bank Ltd (ADR) stock is experiencing pressure due to moderating growth in the Indian banking sector and outflows from foreign institutional investors, prompting European investors to reconsider their exposure to emerging market lenders. Despite robust capital, its valuation and growth prospects are being weighed against competitive funding costs and potential credit quality risks.

title: Earnings call transcript: Vivid Seats Q4 2025 sees steep revenue fall, stock drops

title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: Casella Waste (CWST), CNH Industrial (CNH) and Hayward Holdings (HAYW)

summary: NuCana plc's stock (ISIN: GB00BD8P0H86) is trading around $2.00, facing weak technical signals and low momentum as biotech volatility continues into March 2026. title: Stifel Welcomes Veteran Healthcare Bankers Ajay Pathak and Bill Reisner as Managing Directors in Public Finance

title: Novo regained weight loss footing in the pill arena — but Lilly is coming

However, with Lilly's orforglipron showing high efficacy but also increased side effects, the competition in the oral space is intensifying, making Novo Nordisk's position potentially precarious.

title: Vera Bradley, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRA) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript

The achievement underscores Lotus Tech's commitment to safety and compliance with international ADAS standards.

title: Prospective, Multi-center Study Published in Future Oncology Demonstrates DecisionDx®-Melanoma’s i31-SLNB Result Outperforms Staging Criteria in Identifying Patients with Cutaneous Melanoma Below the 5% NCCN Threshold for Forgoing SLNB
summary: A new prospective, multicenter study published in Future Oncology validates that Castle Biosciences' DecisionDx-Melanoma's i31-SLNB test accurately identifies cutaneous melanoma patients with a low risk of sentinel lymph node (SLN) positivity, outperforming traditional staging criteria. The study found that patients predicted to have less than a 5% risk by i31-SLNB had an actual SLN positivity rate of 2.6% and a 97.8% three-year recurrence-free survival. These results support using the i31-SLNB to guide decisions on foregoing SLNB in alignment with NCCN guidelines, reducing unnecessary procedures and associated costs.

title: Canadian Telecom Telus Says It’s Investigating Cyber Breach
summary: Canadian telecommunications provider Telus Corp. is investigating a cybersecurity incident involving unauthorized access to a limited number of its systems. An extortion group named ShinyHunters claimed responsibility, stating they plan to release data stolen in a supply chain attack and had sent Telus a Bitcoin ransom note in February. Telus confirmed it is working with law enforcement and cyber forensics experts, assuring that business operations are unaffected.

summary: Tower Semiconductor has partnered with Lightwave Logic to integrate electro-optic polymer modulators into its PH18 silicon photonics platform, aiming for compact, power-efficient designs for AI and data centers. title: Oncology Institute 2025 10-K: $502.7M Revenue, $(0.54) EPS
summary: The Oncology Institute reported a significant increase in total operating revenue to $502.7 million for 2025, a 27.8% jump primarily driven by specialty pharmacy and patient services. While the company's net loss narrowed to $60.6 million, its net loss per share improved to $(0.54), up from $(0.71) the previous year. Operational efficiency and strategic shifts, including a rise in specialty pharmacy as the largest revenue channel and expansion of its provider network, contributed to the improved financial performance.

title: Uber's Vegas Robotaxis Still Need A Human Watching The Road
summary: Uber has launched an all-electric robotaxi service in Las Vegas in partnership with Motional, using the IONIQ 5 robotaxi. Although the vehicle is SAE Level 4 autonomous, it still requires a human operator to monitor the road. This initiative is part of Uber's broader strategy to expand its autonomous vehicle offerings and has also announced partnerships to deploy robotaxis in Tokyo and expand U.S. efforts.

title: Tetra Tech Joint Venture Awarded $99 Million U.S. Navy A-E Services Contract
summary: Tetra Tech and its joint venture partner Mason & Hanger have been awarded a $99 million single-award task order contract by Naval Facilities Engineering Systems Command (NAVFAC) Southeast. This 5-year contract tasks the JV with providing comprehensive architect-engineer services for resilient military infrastructure projects. The services will include engineering, design, and technical support for waterfront, marine, and other shore-based facilities, focusing on water and energy efficiency and environmental protection.

title: trivago Expands Leadership Team with Three C-Level Appointments
summary: trivago N.V. (NASDAQ: TRVG) has expanded its leadership team with three new C-level appointments: Chief Technology Officer (CTO), Chief Intelligence Officer, and Chief Commercial Officer (CCO). This move follows a period of significant transformation and growth for the company, with 2025 showing 19% total revenue growth and €15.8m in adjusted EBITDA. The new appointments, filled by internal leaders Alexander Volkmann, Sherin Hegazy, and Ioannis Papadopoulos, aim to drive the company's next chapter by focusing on technology, data intelligence, and commercial strategy, especially in leveraging AI.

The total cost for the project is estimated at $443 million.

title: Victorian search and rescue dog teams join Motorola Solutions radio network
summary: Two Victorian volunteer search and rescue dog organisations, ASAR-K9 and SARDA, have been integrated into the Victorian Radio Network (VRN), equipped with Motorola Solutions APX 8000 portable two-way radios. title: LM Delivers 2nd Shipment of Aegis System Equipped Vessel Shipsets and AN/SPY-7(V)1 Radar Equipment to Japan

title: The Agentic Era: Inside Salesforce’s (CRM) 114% AI Revenue Surge and the Agentforce Revolution
summary: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) experienced a 114% surge in AI platform Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) thanks to its "Agentforce" platform, transitioning from a CRM provider to a dominant "Agentic AI" platform. The acquisition is pending shareholder and regulatory approvals and is expected to close in late 2026, with both companies operating independently until then.

A judge ruled the trial would proceed and admitted evidence against Live Nation's objections, including an employee's comments about "outrageous" VIP charges.

title: New melanoma test flags patients who can skip lymph node biopsy
summary: Castle Biosciences' DecisionDx-Melanoma's i31-SLNB test effectively identifies melanoma patients at low risk of sentinel lymph node (SLN) positivity, allowing many to forgo SLNB procedures. A new prospective multicenter study published in Future Oncology shows that patients with less than a 5% predicted risk by i31-SLNB had an actual SLN positivity rate of only 2.6%, and demonstrated a 97.8% three-year recurrence-free survival rate. This test surpasses guidelines and other predictive gene expression profile tests, offering a more precise tool for clinical decision-making.

title: Designer Brands (NYSE: DBI) grants major RSU awards to executive chairman
summary: Designer Brands Inc. (NYSE: DBI) has granted its Executive Chairman and 10% owner, Jay L. Schottenstein, two significant Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) awards. These equity compensation awards, totaling 50,065 RSUs with a key date of March 28, 2027, and 194,363 RSUs with a key date of March 28, 2028, represent a contingent right to receive Class A common shares. The grants are compensation-related and do not involve a cash outlay or market transaction, aiming to increase his future equity exposure.

title: Designer Brands (NYSE: DBI) executive receives new restricted stock unit grants
summary: Andrea O'Donnell, EVP, COO & Brands President of Designer Brands Inc. (NYSE: DBI), received two new grants of restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 11, 2026. These grants include 12,517 RSUs converting on March 28, 2027, and 33,511 RSUs converting on March 28, 2028. These awards are compensation-related and represent a contingent right to receive Class A common shares, not open-market purchases.

title: Designer Brands (DBI) EVP Laura Davis receives new restricted stock unit awards
summary: Designer Brands Inc. EVP Laura Davis, who is also the President of DSW Designer Shoe Warehouse, was awarded two grants of restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 11, 2026. These compensation-related grants include 13,768 RSUs with an exercise and expiration date of March 28, 2027, and an additional 36,862 RSUs expiring on March 28, 2028. Each RSU represents a contingent right to receive one Class A common share, and no open-market transactions were reported in the filing.

title: Fastenal eyes 900,000 sq-ft Georgia warehouse, plans to add jobs
summary: Fastenal Company announced it will break ground on a new Southeast U.S. regional operations and logistics center in Carrollton, Georgia. This facility, significantly larger than their current Atlanta center, is slated to open in spring 2027 and could expand to 900,000 square feet. It will incorporate advanced warehouse technologies to boost capacity and efficiency, and Fastenal plans to expand its team over the next five years to support growth and community ties.

title: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) CEO uses 3,625 shares to cover tax bill
summary: Joakim Weidemanis, CEO of Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), reported a disposition of 3,625 Ordinary Shares to cover tax obligations arising from equity compensation. This transaction was a tax-withholding event, not an open-market sale, with shares valued at $130.94 each. After this, Weidemanis directly holds 54,628.18 Ordinary Shares.

title: (DCBO) Risk-Controlled Trading Report (DCBO:CA)
summary: This report provides a risk-controlled trading analysis for Docebo Inc. (DCBO:CA), offering long-term trading plans with buy and short targets and corresponding stop-loss levels. It includes AI-generated ratings for near, mid, and long terms, with Strong, Weak, and Weak ratings respectively. The article also lists links to recent articles related to Docebo Inc.

title: UBS (AMUB) offers high-yield autocallable notes linked to Newmont stock
summary: UBS AG is offering high-yield Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Newmont Corporation stock (NEM), maturing on March 17, 2028. These notes offer potential periodic contingent coupons with an example rate of 19.57% per annum, but investors risk losing a significant portion or all of their initial investment if the underlying stock performs poorly or if UBS defaults. The notes feature an automatic call mechanism and contingent principal repayment based on Newmont's stock performance relative to specified barriers and thresholds.

title: UBS (AMUB) issues autocallable notes maturing Mar 19, 2029 linked to FCX
summary: UBS AG is offering $600,000 Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to the common stock of Freeport-McMoRan Inc. with a maturity date of March 19, 2029. These notes provide contingent coupon payments if the underlying stock meets a specific barrier level and feature an automatic call if the stock reaches its initial level before maturity. Investors face significant risks, including potential loss of principal if the notes are not called and the final stock level falls below the downside threshold, as well as credit risk from UBS.

title: Form 424B5 Silvaco Group, Inc.
summary: Silvaco Group, Inc. filed a Form 424B5 prospectus supplement to offer and sell up to $15,000,000 of its common stock through an "at the market offering" with Jefferies LLC as its sales agent. The company's common stock is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol "SVCO", with a last reported sale price of $3.30 per share on March 12, 2026. The proceeds from this offering will be used for general corporate purposes, including potential acquisitions and investments in businesses and technologies.

title: Raymond James cuts Jefferson Capital stock price target on valuation
summary: Raymond James revised its price target for Jefferson Capital Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:JCAP) from $25 to $22, while maintaining an Outperform rating, following the company's fourth-quarter 2025 results. Although adjusted diluted EPS of $0.69 slightly missed estimates, the company's full-year diluted EPS of $5.64, strong cash EBITDA, efficient collections, and attractive dividend yield of 4.72% support a positive medium-term outlook. The firm highlighted Jefferson Capital's strong financial health and strategic acquisitions, contrasting with Citizens' more optimistic $26 price target.

title: Northern Trust Corp. Stock (ISIN: US6658591044) Holds Steady Amid Banking Sector Volatility
summary: Northern Trust Corp. (ISIN: US6658591044) is demonstrating resilience in a volatile banking sector, particularly appealing to European investors due to its asset servicing strength and fee-based revenue model. The company's focus on custody banking, asset servicing, and wealth management, along with a strong balance sheet and dividend growth, provides stability. Northern Trust's presence in European indices and its servicing of European clients further enhance its attractiveness for diversified portfolios.

title: Context Therapeutics Adopts Shareholder-Friendly Board Governance Changes
summary: Context Therapeutics (CNTX) has adopted significant shareholder-friendly board governance changes following a Delaware Court of Chancery ruling. Effective March 11, 2026, director terms will be one year, and directors can be removed with or without cause by a majority vote, replacing previous three-year terms and removal for cause only. The company's 2026 annual meeting on June 24, 2026, will reflect these changes, emphasizing increased investor influence, though TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates CNTX as Neutral due to weak financial performance despite a strong technical uptrend.

title: F5 Shareholders Approve 2026 Incentive Plan and Governance Items
summary: F5 (FFIV) shareholders have approved the 2026 Incentive Award Plan, authorizing 3.5 million new shares for equity-based compensation and rolling over remaining shares from the previous plan. This move, along with a new Non-Employee Director Compensation Program, aims to attract and retain key leadership while aligning executive incentives with shareholder interests. The shareholders also elected eight directors and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor, demonstrating strong support for the company's governance and compensation strategies.

title: Adaire Fox-Martin Sells 1,086 Shares of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Stock
summary: Adaire Fox-Martin, CEO of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX), sold 1,086 shares of the company's stock on March 12th for approximately $1.05 million, reducing her direct ownership to 19,574 shares. This followed an earlier sale of 2,670 shares in January. Despite missing recent quarterly earnings estimates, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Equinix, with an average price target of $1,006.91, and the company recently increased its quarterly dividend.

title: Charles Meyers Sells 305 Shares of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Stock
summary: Charles Meyers, Chairman of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX), sold 305 shares of the company's stock on March 12, 2026, for approximately $293,162.95, reducing his stake by 2.36%. The sale comes as Equinix increased its quarterly dividend, though its payout ratio is high at 150.11%, exceeding earnings. The company recently missed quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, yet analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a $1,006.91 consensus target price.

title: Insider Selling: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) EVP Sells 584 Shares of Stock
summary: Equinix EVP Raouf Abdel sold 584 shares of EQIX stock for approximately $563,963, reducing his position by 6.99%. This recent sale follows an earlier one in January. Despite missing quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, analysts maintain an "overweight" rating with a consensus target price of $1,006.91, and Equinix recently increased its quarterly dividend to $5.16 per share.

title: Credo Technology Group (NASDAQ:CRDO) CTO Chi Fung Cheng Sells 27,500 Shares of Stock
summary: Credo Technology Group's CTO, Chi Fung Cheng, sold 27,500 shares of CRDO stock for $3.234 million on March 11th, reducing his position by 0.44% but still holding over 6 million shares. This sale is part of a series of insider sales since December. Despite the insider selling, Credo recently reported strong earnings, with EPS of $1.07 and revenue of $407 million, exceeding analyst expectations, and the stock maintains a "Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $206.33.

title: Waste Management's Devina Rankin resigns as CFO, receives $1M transition bonus
summary: Devina Rankin resigned as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Waste Management, effective November 1, 2025, after 23 years with the company, including nearly nine years as CFO. She received a $1 million cash transition bonus on March 13, 2026. A successor has been appointed, though not yet disclosed.

title: [Form 4] UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES INC Insider Trading Activity
summary: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES INC President and CEO Marc D. Miller reported several insider trading activities on March 12, 2026. These included exercising options to acquire 100,425 shares of Class B Common Stock and receiving 63,036 shares through the vesting of performance-based RSUs. To cover taxes and exercise costs, Miller disposed of 110,850 shares, resulting in a direct holding of 363,907 Class B shares, with additional shares held indirectly through family trusts.

title: Universal Truckload: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
summary: Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. (ULH) reported earnings of $3.7 million in its fourth quarter, with net income of 14 cents per share and revenue of $385.4 million. For the full year, the company posted a loss of $99.9 million, or $3.79 per share, on revenue of $1.56 billion.

title: Vita Coco (NASDAQ: COCO) chair’s trust sells 50,000 shares under 10b5-1 plan
summary: The Michael Kirban Revocable Trust, associated with Vita Coco (NASDAQ: COCO) Executive Chairman Michael Kirban, sold 50,000 shares of common stock at $58 per share on March 11–12, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Kirban retains substantial indirect ownership through this trust and another, as well as direct holdings and numerous stock options expiring between 2029 and 2035. The transactions are considered routine, signaling planned liquidity rather than opportunistic selling due to the pre-arranged nature of the 10b5-1 plan.

title: Consumers Energy provides update on outages and repair efforts late Friday
summary: Consumers Energy is actively addressing widespread power outages across Michigan caused by high winds, snow, sleet, and rain. Over 450 crews are on the ground, working to restore power, with efforts complicated by further challenging weather expected over the weekend. The company emphasizes safety and advises customers to stay updated through their outage center and alerts.

title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) missiles chief sells 4,620 shares
summary: Timothy S. Cahill, President of Missiles & Fire Control at Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT), sold a total of 4,620 shares of common stock on March 11, 2026, through several open-market transactions. The shares were sold at weighted average prices ranging from $647.7432 to $655.8994 per share. Following these sales, Cahill directly holds 9,590.746 common shares and indirectly holds an additional 73.9491 shares through the company's savings plan.

title: Bargain Alert: Wells Fargo and Goldman Sachs Look Deeply Oversold
summary: Wells Fargo and Goldman Sachs have seen significant stock drops, falling roughly 20% from recent highs, putting them in technically oversold territory. Despite recent underperformance linked to earnings misses and broader market pressures, analysts remain broadly bullish, suggesting these declines might present a buying opportunity. The article highlights oversold RSI levels and positive analyst ratings as indicators that a recovery rally for both financial giants could be imminent.

title: Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) CFO sells 2,959 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
summary: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) EVP and CFO Sandeep Reddy reported the sale of 2,959 shares of company common stock at $399.60 per share on March 11, 2026. This transaction was carried out under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Additionally, 196 shares were withheld at $393.29 per share to cover tax obligations related to equity compensation, leaving Reddy with 9,687 shares directly owned after these transactions.

title: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) COO logs routine tax-related share withholding in Form 4
summary: Domino's Pizza's COO, Joseph Hugh Jordan, reported a routine tax-related share withholding in a recent Form 4 SEC filing. On March 11, 2026, 182 shares of common stock were withheld at $393.29 each to cover tax obligations, not an open-market sale. Following this transaction, Jordan directly holds 11,157.268 shares and indirectly holds 244.447 shares through a 401(k) savings plan.

title: Domino's Pizza (NYSE: DPZ) EVP logs 1,745-share sale under 10b5-1 plan
summary: Domino's Pizza EVP Cynthia A. Headen executed a pre-planned sale of 1,745 shares at $399.60 per share under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on August 18, 2025. Additionally, she disposed of 104 shares at $393.29 to cover tax obligations. After these transactions on March 11, 2026, she retains significant direct and indirect holdings in the company.

title: Sempra Cancels Vista Pacifico LNG in the Aquarium of the World
summary: Sempra has cancelled its proposed Vista Pacifico liquefied natural gas (LNG) project in Topolobampo, Sinaloa, marking a significant victory for environmentalists and local communities. This cancellation is the second of three major LNG projects planned for the Gulf of California, a region renowned for its biodiversity and dubbed the "aquarium of the world." The decision follows intense opposition from Mexican communities and U.S. supporters, including the NRDC, who raised concerns about the project's impact on climate, marine life, and local fisheries.

title: Why Shares of Golar LNG (GLNG) Are Falling Today
summary: Golar LNG (GLNG) shares fell 3.2% following major disruptions to LNG supplies from the Middle East, specifically due to closures in the Strait of Hormuz which removed about 19% of global LNG exports. This supply shortage has increased European gas prices and created market uncertainty. Despite the dip, GLNG shares have risen 13.4% year-to-date and are near their 52-week high, indicating investors see the impact as significant but not fundamentally altering their long-term outlook.

title: John Morris sells STX shares via 10b5-1 plans (STX)
summary: A recent Form 144 disclosure from Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC reported John Morris's sales of Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) common stock under pre-arranged 10b5-1 plans. The filing details two sales: $98,400.00 for 240 shares on February 24, 2026, and $32,983.57 for 113 shares on December 15, 2025. Additionally, the document records Restricted Stock Units dated March 9, 2026.

title: Talos Energy Hits New 52-Week High
summary: Talos Energy Inc. (NYSE:TALO) reached a new 52-week high of $13.87, closing at $13.77 with high trading volume, reflecting increased investor confidence despite mixed Q4 2025 earnings. While some analysts have downgraded the stock due to market volatility in the Gulf of Mexico, others have raised price targets citing growth potential. The company's future performance will largely depend on its offshore oil and gas exploration in the Gulf.

title: [144] Extra Space Storage Inc. SEC Filing
summary: This article reports on an SEC Form 144 filing by Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR). The filing indicates a proposed sale of 7,500 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $1,051,350.00 by an unnamed filer, acquired through Restricted Stock Awards on February 22, 2023.

title: CRH Announces Intention to Delist from the LSE and Cancel Preference Shares
summary: CRH (NYSE: CRH) has announced its intention to delist its ordinary shares and 7% preference shares from the London Stock Exchange (LSE) and, subject to shareholder approval, cancel its 5% and 7% preference shares. The company's primary listing moved to the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) in September 2023, and the LSE delisting is expected to be effective from April 20, 2026, making NYSE its sole listing for ordinary shares. The proposed preference share cancellations involve cash payments to shareholders and require approval at upcoming shareholder meetings in May 2026.

title: EQT Corp (EQT) EVP sells 7,634 shares at $64.35 each
summary: EQT Corp's EVP Operations, J.E.B. Bolen, sold 7,634 shares of company common stock at an average price of $64.35 per share on March 12, 2026. Following this open-market transaction, Bolen directly holds 83,550 EQT common shares. This insider trading activity was reported via an SEC Form 4 filing.

title: EBAY's Chief Growth Officer Sells 15,000 Shares
summary: Julie A Loeger, EBAY's Senior Vice President and Chief Growth Officer, sold 15,000 shares of common stock on March 12, 2026, for a total of $1,363,200 at a weighted average price of $90.88 per share. Following this transaction, Loeger directly holds 46,800 shares of EBAY. This information is based on an SEC Form 4 filing.

title: FedEx Corp Stock (ISIN: US3142111034) Faces Analyst Optimism Amid Tariff Headwinds and Freight Spin-Off Plans
summary: FedEx stock dipped 2.29% to $353.13, yet Goldman Sachs raised its price target to $369, maintaining a Buy rating due to the company's resilience despite tariff risks and strategic restructuring. Analysts are optimistic about FedEx's prospects, highlighted by raised FY2026 EPS guidance and a planned FedEx Freight spin-off aimed at unlocking value. However, risks from potential new tariffs and geopolitical tensions, along with market volatility, warrant caution for investors.

title: Credo Technology’s Stellar Q3 Signals Massive AI-Driven Growth​
summary: Credo Technology (CRDO) reported exceptional Q3 FY2026 results with revenue surging 202% year-over-year, driven by increasing demand for AI-driven interconnect solutions and new product introductions like ZeroFlap optics. Despite a recent dip in stock price due to high investor expectations for forward guidance, the company's strategic acquisition of CoMira Solutions and expansion into AI infrastructure position it for sustained long-term growth. Analysts generally maintain a positive outlook, emphasizing the company's foundational strength in the AI and semiconductor industries.
